acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp covers injury third-party manufacturer lawsuit possible for extra damages.[11]

suggestedAnswer.text: Taylorsville on-the-job accidents with defective tools get comp benefits plus sue supplier outside no-fault system. Recover pain suffering lost future earnings. Subrogation applies insurer reimbursed from verdict—attorney coordinates claims.[11]
